polite.en: It is polite to say thank you.

pool.en: We swim in the pool in summer.
pool.zh: 夏天我們在游泳池游泳。

poor.en: The poor family had little food.
poor.zh: 那個貧窮的家庭幾乎沒有食物。

popcorn.en: We ate popcorn at the movie.
popcorn.zh: 我們看電影時吃爆米花。

popular.en: This song is very popular now.

possible.en: It is possible to finish today.

pot.en: She cooked soup in a big pot.

power.en: The strong wind has great power.

practice.en: I practice the piano every day.

present.en: She gave me a birthday present.
present.zh: 她送了我一份生日禮物。

pretty.zh: 她穿了一件漂亮的洋裝。

price.en: The price of this bag is too high.

program.en: My favorite TV program is on tonight.
program.zh: 我最喜歡的電視節目今晚播出。

proud.en: My parents are proud of me.

public.en: We should be quiet in public places.
public.zh: 在公共場所我們應該保持安靜。

pull.en: Pull the rope as hard as you can.

push.en: Please push the door to open it.

put.en: Put your books on the shelf.

quarter.en: I ate a quarter of the pizza.
quarter.zh: 我吃了四分之一的披薩。

queen.en: The queen wore a golden crown.

question.en: May I ask you a question?
question.zh: 我可以問你一個問題嗎？

quiet.en: Please be quiet during the test.

race.en: He won first place in the race.
race.zh: 他在比賽中得了第一名。

radio.en: We listen to music on the radio.

rainbow.en: A rainbow appeared after the rain.

rainy.en: I stay home on rainy days.

raise.en: Please raise your hand to speak.

reach.en: I can't reach the top shelf.
reach.zh: 我搆不到最上層的架子。

read.en: I read a story before bed.

really.zh: 我真的很喜歡這部電影。

reason.en: What is the reason for being late?

relative.en: Many relatives came to the wedding.

repeat.en: Could you please repeat the question?
repeat.zh: 你可以重複一次問題嗎？

report.en: She wrote a report about animals.
report.zh: 她寫了一篇關於動物的報告。

reporter.en: The reporter asked the singer many questions.
reporter.zh: 記者問了歌手許多問題。

rest.en: You should rest when you are tired.

restaurant.en: We had dinner at a nice restaurant.
restaurant.zh: 我們在一家不錯的餐廳吃晚餐。

rice.en: We eat rice with almost every meal.

rich.en: The rich man owns three houses.
rich.zh: 那位有錢人擁有三棟房子。

ride.en: I ride my bike to school.

rise.en: The sun rises in the morning.

road.en: This road leads to the city.

robot.en: The robot can clean the floor.
robot.zh: 這個機器人會清掃地板。

rock.en: A big rock blocked the path.
rock.zh: 一塊大石頭擋住了小路。

roll.en: The ball rolled down the hill.

room.en: My room is clean and tidy.

root.en: The roots of the tree are deep.

rope.en: They tied the boat with a rope.

rose.en: He gave her a red rose.

round.en: The moon is round and bright.

row.en: We sat in the front row.

rule.en: We must follow the school rules.

ruler.en: I draw straight lines with a ruler.

run.en: I run in the park every morning.
run.zh: 我每天早上在公園跑步。

sad.en: She felt sad when her pet died.
sad.zh: 她的寵物死了，她很難過。

safe.en: It is safe to cross now.

salad.en: I had a fresh salad for lunch.
salad.zh: 我午餐吃了一份新鮮沙拉。

sale.en: The shoes are on sale today.

salt.en: Add a little salt to the soup.

same.en: We go to the same school.

save.en: I save money to buy a bike.

school.en: Our school has a big playground.

sea.en: The sea is blue and calm today.
sea.zh: 今天的大海湛藍又平靜。

season.zh: 春天是我最喜歡的季節。

second.en: He came in second in the race.
second.zh: 他在比賽中得了第二名。

see.en: I can see the mountains from here.

seed.en: We planted some seeds in the garden.
seed.zh: 我們在花園裡種了一些種子。

sell.en: They sell fruit at the market.

send.en: I will send you a message.

sentence.en: Please write a sentence with this word.
sentence.zh: 請用這個字造一個句子。

serious.zh: 他的表情看起來很嚴肅。

service.zh: 這家飯店提供良好的服務。

set.en: Please set the cups on the table.

several.en: I have read this book several times.
several.zh: 這本書我讀過好幾次了。

shake.en: Shake the bottle before you open it.

shall.en: Shall we go for a walk?

shape.en: A ball has a round shape.

share.en: Please share your toys with others.
share.zh: 請和別人分享你的玩具。

sharp.en: Be careful, the knife is sharp.

ship.en: The ship sailed across the sea.

shirt.en: He is wearing a white shirt.

shoe.en: My new shoes are very comfortable.

shop.en: Let's go shopping at the new shop.
shop.zh: 我們去那家新店逛逛吧。

short.en: He is short but very strong.

shoulder.en: The bag hangs on my shoulder.

shower.en: I take a shower after exercise.

sick.en: She stayed home because she was sick.

side.en: Walk on the right side of the road.

sight.en: The sunset was a beautiful sight.
sight.zh: 那日落是個美麗的景象。

sign.zh: 那個標誌寫著「禁止停車」。

simple.en: This is a simple and easy question.
simple.zh: 這是個簡單又容易的問題。

since.en: I have lived here since I was a child.

sir.en: Excuse me, sir, is this your bag?
sir.zh: 先生，不好意思，這是您的包嗎？

sister.en: My sister and I share a room.
sister.zh: 我和姊姊共用一個房間。

size.en: What size of shoes do you wear?

skirt.en: She wore a blue skirt to school.

sky.en: The sky is full of stars tonight.

sleep.en: Babies need a lot of sleep.

small.en: A mouse is a small animal.

smart.en: He is a smart and hardworking boy.
smart.zh: 他是個聰明又努力的男孩。

smile.en: She gave me a warm smile.
smile.zh: 她對我露出溫暖的微笑。

smoke.en: Smoke is coming out of the chimney.

snake.en: The snake moved slowly through the grass.

snow.en: Snow falls in the cold winter.

so.en: I was tired, so I went to bed early.

sofa.en: We sat on the sofa to watch TV.
sofa.zh: 我們坐在沙發上看電視。

soldier.en: The brave soldier protected his country.
soldier.zh: 勇敢的士兵保衛他的國家。

some.en: I bought some apples at the market.
some.zh: 我在市場買了一些蘋果。

someone-somebody.en: Someone is knocking at the door.

something.en: I want something cold to drink.

somewhere.en: Let's go somewhere quiet to talk.
somewhere.zh: 我們去個安靜的地方聊聊吧。

sore.en: I have a sore throat today.

sorry.en: I am sorry I broke your cup.
sorry.zh: 對不起，我打破了你的杯子。

sound.en: I heard a strange sound at night.
sound.zh: 我晚上聽到一個奇怪的聲音。

soup.en: The hot soup warmed me up.

south.en: Birds fly south for the winter.

space.en: There is not enough space in the box.

special.en: Today is a special day for us.
special.zh: 今天對我們來說是特別的一天。

square.en: The box has a square shape.

stair.en: She walked up the stairs slowly.

stand.en: Please stand up when the teacher comes in.

star.en: The stars shine brightly at night.

station.en: We waited for the train at the station.

stay.en: Please stay here until I come back.
stay.zh: 請待在這裡直到我回來。

stop.en: Please stop at the red light.

store.en: I bought milk at the store.

story.en: Grandpa told us a funny story.
story.zh: 爺爺跟我們講了一個好笑的故事。

strange.zh: 我聽到一個奇怪的聲音。

string.en: She tied the box with a string.
string.zh: 她用細繩把盒子綁起來。

strong.en: He is strong enough to lift the box.
strong.zh: 他夠強壯，可以抬起那個箱子。

stupid.en: It was stupid to forget my keys.

subject.zh: 數學是我最喜歡的科目。

successful.en: She is a successful business owner.

sugar.en: I put sugar in my coffee.
